simple_types.name: b2BodyType
simple_types.code:
type b2BodyType is 
  (b2_staticBody,
   b2_kinematicBody,
   b2_dynamicBody,
   b2_bodyTypeCount)
with Convention => C;

simple_types.name: b2JointType
simple_types.code:
type b2JointType is 
  (b2_distanceJoint,
   b2_filterJoint,
   b2_motorJoint,
   b2_prismaticJoint,
   b2_revoluteJoint,
   b2_weldJoint,
   b2_wheelJoint)
with Convention => C;

simple_types.name: b2ShapeType
simple_types.code:
type b2ShapeType is 
  (b2_circleShape,
   b2_capsuleShape,
   b2_segmentShape,
   b2_polygonShape,
   b2_chainSegmentShape,
   b2_shapeTypeCount)
with Convention => C;

array_types.name: anon_array2369
array_types.code: type anon_array2369 is array (0 .. 23) of aliased int;
